csv.title: Location Mapping Editor
csv.description: Manage and edit location mapping data.
csv.filteredRows: Showing {shown} of {total} rows (filtered by your permissions)
csv.noAccessDescription: Your account does not have permission to edit any locations. Range restrictions are either disabled or no filter groups are defined.
csv.contactAdmin: Please contact an administrator to configure your access permissions.

svg.title: Map Files
svg.confirmDelete: Delete this map? Patrons won't see it anymore.
svg.confirmReplace: Replace the Floor {floor} map with this file? I'll keep the current one in Version History so you can roll back.
svg.confirmReplaceFile: Replace {filename} with this file? I'll keep the current one in Version History so you can roll back.
svg.replaceSuccess: Done — the Floor {floor} map is updated. The previous one is saved in Version History.
svg.replaceSuccessFile: Done — {filename} is updated. The previous one is saved in Version History.
svg.replaceError: I couldn't replace that map. Please try again.

staging.promoted: Your new map is now live.
staging.promoteFailed: I couldn't publish the map. Please try again.
staging.uploadFailed: I couldn't take that map. Please try again.
staging.reconcileFailed: I couldn't apply those fixes. Please try again.
staging.confirmDiscard: Throw away this map and start over?
staging.discardFailed: I couldn't discard it. Please try again.

progress.heading: Replacing the Floor {floor} map
progress.validating: Checking it against your shelf information…
progress.leaveWarning: I'm still working on your map — leaving now could leave it half-updated.
progress.doNotClose: Please keep this tab open — I'm still working.
progress.stuckWarning: This is taking longer than usual — it may not have gone through. Keep waiting, or close and try again.

validate.passed: The map you sent looks fine — it passed my checks and matches your shelf information. Want to start using it?
validate.renamed: {count} shelf(s) were renamed — same physical shelf, new label:
validate.renamedHint: Same spot on the map — no patron-facing links break.
validate.newlyAdded: This map has {count} new shelf(s) I don't have library info for yet — patrons won't find them in search until you add them:
validate.newlyAddedHint: Each one needs a library entry (a CSV row) before patrons can find it in search.
validate.removed: {count} shelf(s) from the old map aren't on this one anymore:
validate.unlinked: Heads up: {count} library entr(y/ies) point to shelves that aren't on this map anymore — they'll stop showing up in search until you re-link them:
validate.preExisting: {count} shelf(s) on the map still have no library info (already like this) — patrons can't find them until you add them:
validate.preExistingHint: These were already unmapped before this upload.
validate.failed: I checked the map and found {count} thing(s) that don't match your shelf data yet. Let's fix them together.

staging.awaiting: I haven't checked this map yet. Press "Check the map" when you're ready.
staging.noStaging: No map is waiting for review. Upload a new map to start.
staging.lockedByOther: {owner} is working on a map right now — wait for them to finish or ask them to discard it.

validation.invalidRange: Range start must be less than or equal to range end
validation.rangePrefixMismatch: Range start and end must have the same prefix
validation.duplicateKey: Duplicate entry: this combination of range and SVG code already exists
validation.rangeOverlap: Warning: This range overlaps with another entry in the same collection
validation.svgCodeNotFound: Warning: This SVG code was not found in the floor map

search.placeholder: Search by collection, range, or shelf...
search.searchTip: Tip: Search by collection name, call number range, or shelf label

emptyState.searchFirst: Enter a search term to find locations
emptyState.trashHint: Deleted items will appear here for 30 days

trash.title: Trash
trash.confirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items in trash?
trash.expiresIn: Will be permanently deleted in {days} days

dialog.restoreWarning: This will restore the selected version. Current data will be replaced. This action cannot be undone.

users.title: User Management
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.typeToConfirm: Type the username to confirm deletion:
users.createSuccess: User created successfully. Temporary password sent via email.
users.resetSuccess: Password reset initiated. Temporary password sent via email.
users.cannotModifySelf: Cannot modify your own admin status

deleteDialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this location?
deleteDialog.trashInfo: This item will be moved to trash and can be restored within 30 days.

batch.title: Batch Edit
batch.noFieldsSelected: Select at least one field to update
batch.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to move {count} items to trash?

banner.repair: Click the shelf where this range belongs
banner.move: Click the new shelf for this range

panel.title: Shelf assignment needs fixing
panel.empty: No orphans on floor {n} — switch tabs to see others
panel.allRepaired: All orphans repaired on this floor

card.readOnly: Read-only — ask an admin to repair this row

explanation.wrongSvgCode: This row points at a shelf that no longer exists on this floor's map. Click "Pick correct shelf on map" to choose the right one visually.
explanation.missingSvgCode: This row has no shelf assigned yet. Click "Pick correct shelf on map" to choose one visually.

empty.message: No ranges are mapped to this shelf yet.
empty.explanation: This shelf is on the map but has no ranges assigned. Click 'Create the first range here' to add the first range — you can set the collection and the call-number range in the next step.

mapEditor.unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard and close?

ranges.disabledExplanation: When disabled, this editor cannot edit any locations. Enable range restrictions to specify which locations this editor can access.
ranges.noFilterGroups: No filter groups defined. Add a filter group to specify editable ranges.
ranges.collectionsHelp: Select collections this editor can access. Leave empty to allow all collections.
ranges.floorsHelp: Select floors this editor can access. Leave empty to allow all floors.
ranges.callNumberHelp: Specify call number ranges this editor can access. Leave empty to allow all call numbers.
ranges.noRanges: No call number ranges defined (all call numbers allowed)
ranges.incompleteRange: Filter Group {group}, Range {range}: Both start and end are required
ranges.orLogicExplanation: Multiple filter groups use OR logic - the editor can access locations matching ANY of the defined groups.
